videos.description:
For decades the rule was simple: data is your edge. If you're serious, it's the thing nobody else has.

So it's worth sitting with what happens when you hand all of that data to a frontier model as context. Once Claude is living in your Slack as a team-level harness, sitting next to everything your team does, you are effectively renting your own context back to yourself. And the more useful it gets, the more impossible it becomes to rip out.

That's not an argument against using it. It's an argu

videos.title: With AI, going slow is the dangerous move #AI #productivity #mindset #technology
videos.description:
Think about learning to ride a bike. When you go slow, it is almost impossible to balance, and every wobble makes you want to slow down even more. Speed up, and the balance suddenly comes to you. Kids fight this instinct constantly. They are sure that slower means safer, when the opposite is true.

AI works the same way. Hanging back and moving cautiously feels like the responsible choice, but it is the one that leaves you wobbling and falling behind. The steadiness comes from leaning in and goi
